## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

List the commands or manual checks used to verify the change.

## Risk

Describe user impact, compatibility concerns, security implications, and any
files or behavior removed by this change.

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR has a focused scope.
- [ ] Tests, type checking, and builds pass where applicable.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, personal data, or generated local files are included.
- [ ] Destructive changes are clearly identified and justified.
- [ ] Documentation is updated when behavior or setup changes.
- [ ] I reviewed the complete diff before requesting merge.
